tools.name: list_verification_methods
tools.summary: List the verification methods registered with the AttestationClient (with trust levels).
whenToUse: Before kicking off a verification — pick the method by trust requirement

tools.name: request_identity_verification
tools.summary: Start a verification flow. Adapter delivers challenge to user (OTP or magic link). Returns request_id + verification_url (for magic-link) + next_step instructions.
sideEffects: Generates secret (OTP or token), persists request
Delivers challenge via adapter (sends WhatsApp / email / etc.)

externalIO: Adapter-specific: WhatsApp API, email provider, etc.

input.subject_type: phone | email | oauth | dni | cuit | custom

output.next_step: string (instructions to surface to the user verbatim)

whenToUse: Sensitive action requires identity proof (e.g., charge > $20k)
Cold-start: need to verify a new user's phone or email
whenNotToUse: User already has a recent valid attestation — check first via findLatestAttestationForSubject (programmatic, not exposed as tool yet)

tools.name: submit_otp_code
tools.summary: Submit the OTP code the user dictated back. Returns the signed Attestation if correct.

errorPatterns.recovery: Tell user attempts remaining; ask for code again

tools.name: check_verification_status
tools.summary: Check whether a verification is pending / verified / expired / failed. Used to poll magic-link flows.

tools.name: get_attestation
tools.summary: Fetch the signed attestation for a completed verification. Returns null if not yet verified.
tools.output: Full Attestation object (with signature) or {found: false}
